description: The Kyokuryū-kai is a yakuza criminal organization based on the Okinawa island of Japan, with an estimated membership of 210–270. It was formed in 1970 as the Okinawa-rengo Kyokuryu-kai by two gangs, the Naha Clan and the Koza Clan. It was Okinawa's largest organized crime group from 1983 until 1990 when a splinter group, the Okinawa Kyokuryu-kai, broke away. The group has been in conflict with the Yamaguchi-gumi and its official policy forbids drug trafficking.
